message:
feat: add --uninstall flag

Remove LLM Proxy installation cleanly:
- Stop and disable systemd service (ignores errors if not installed)
- Remove service file
- Remove shell RC patches (# LLM Proxy + eval lines)
- Remove portfile
- Preserve logs (user can delete manually)
